description_long: This object is a large, rectangular cabinet or shelving unit, designed to resemble a room or display case with four solid exterior walls. One side features a set of large glass sliding doors, allowing a clear view into the interior, which is furnished with a wooden railing, framed pictures, and several decorative items. The opposite side has a single white door, while the remaining two sides are mostly solid with minimal openings, except for a few small circular wall lights and a visible air conditioning unit. The interior is well-lit and includes curtains, a radiator, and various wall-mounted decorations, giving it the appearance of a miniature room or display vignette. The structure is primarily white, with accents of wood and glass, and the overall finish is smooth and modern. This object could serve as a display cabinet, a diorama, or a specialized storage unit in an urban environment.
description: A large, white rectangular cabinet with glass sliding doors, detailed interior decor, and a smooth, modern finish. The unit resembles a miniature room or display case with visible furnishings and wall decorations.
description_view_0: This view shows a mostly solid white wall with a partial glimpse of the interior, including a wooden railing and some decorative items.
description_view_1: This view highlights the large glass sliding doors and the interior decor, including framed pictures and a clock on the back wall.
description_view_2: This view presents another solid white wall with a small air conditioning unit and partial visibility of the interior furnishings.
description_view_3: This view features a single white door and a row of curtains visible through the top, with the rest of the wall being solid.
